response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a live performance by Hololive VTubers. 2. Identified the song "POLKATIC FINALE" via on-screen text and cross-referenced with online search. 3. Identified the composer as 'Nassun' (なっすん). 4. Searched for official Japanese lyrics for 'POLKATIC FINALE'. 5. Parsed and structured the found lyrics into the required JSON format, ensuring proper escaping of special characters. 6. Divided the video into scenes based on content (intro, performance, outro).
response.global_summary: A video of a 3D live performance featuring VTubers Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, and Shishiro Botan. The performance segment features the song "POLKATIC FINALE" by Omaru Polka (composed by Nassun).

scenes.description: The performers interact with the audience and introduce the upcoming song performance.

The song "POLKATIC FINALE" is performed by Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, and Shishiro Botan on a decorated stage. The text 'POLKATIC FINALE' is displayed, alongside the original composer 'なっすん' (Nassun).
scenes.performer_in_video: Omaru Polka, Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan
